title: Hazur Sahib
tagline: Hazur Sahib — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.description: Hazur Sahib (Hazūrī Sāhib; lit. 'presence of the sahib/master'), officially Takht Sachkhand Sri Hazur Abchalnagar Sahib, is one of the five takhts (religious centres) in Sikhism. The gurdwara (Sikh house of worship) was built between 1832 and 1837 by Maharaja Ranjit Singh (1780–1839). It is located on the banks of the Godavari River at the city of Nanded in the state of Maharashtra, India. The structure is built at the place where Guru Gobind Singh Ji died.

topPlaces.name: Nanded
topPlaces.description: Nanded is a city in Maharashtra state, India. It is the tenth largest city in the state and the seventy-ninth most populated city in India.

topPlaces.name: Wajegaon
topPlaces.description: Wajegaon is a census town in the Nanded district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Vishnupuri, Nanded
topPlaces.description: Vishnupuri is a village in Nanded taluka of Nanded district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Nanded city on the Nanded-Latur highway.

topPlaces.name: Wanegaon, Nanded
topPlaces.description: Wanegaon is a village in Nanded taluka of Nanded district of the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is also a railway station on the Nanded-Aurangabad route.

items.note: Nanded is a city in Maharashtra state, India. It is the tenth largest city in the state and the seventy-ninth most populated city in India.
Wajegaon is a census town in the Nanded district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Vishnupuri is a village in Nanded taluka of Nanded district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Nanded city on the Nanded-Latur highway.
Wanegaon is a village in Nanded taluka of Nanded district of the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is also a railway station on the Nanded-Aurangabad route.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hazur Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hazur Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hazur Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (222 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hazur Sahib?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hazur Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hazur Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Hazur Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hazur Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nanded, Wajegaon, Vishnupuri, Nanded, Wanegaon, Nanded.
